## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] Relevant `node --check ...` commands
- [ ] Manual workflow tested, if applicable

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No personal vault data is committed.
- [ ] No API keys, bot tokens, OAuth exports, service-account keys, or `.env.local` values are committed.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, Telegram payloads, and calendar examples are redacted or synthetic.
- [ ] New generated/runtime files are ignored unless intentionally tracked.

## Cost / Cloud Impact

Explain any new model calls, browser automation, AWS resources, scheduled jobs, or default runtime costs.
